title: OIDC Token Response
description: OpenID Connect token response containing access token, ID token, and optional refresh token

access_token.description: OAuth 2.0 access token for API authorization

id_token.description: JWT-encoded ID token containing user identity claims (present when openid scope was requested)

refresh_token.description: Refresh token for obtaining new access tokens (present when offline_access scope was granted)

expires_in.description: Number of seconds until the access token expires

IDTokenClaims.title: ID Token Claims
IDTokenClaims.description: Standard claims contained within a decoded OIDC ID token JWT

iss.description: Issuer - URL of the OpenID Provider

sub.description: Subject - unique identifier for the user at the OpenID Provider

aud.description: Audience - client_id(s) this token is intended for

iat.description: Issued at time as Unix timestamp

auth_time.description: Time of authentication as Unix timestamp

nonce.description: Nonce value from the authorization request

azp.description: Authorized Party - client_id of the token recipient

email_verified.description: Whether the email has been verified
